seo.title: Advanced Navigation | Marine Technology Solutions
seo.description: Global leader in navigation and autonomous systems. Made possible with extensive research, testing and vertically integrated manufacturing, the company has progressed into deep technology fields, including robotics, underwater acoustics, inertial, photonic and quantum sensing.

overview.title: Advanced Navigation
overview.description: Advanced Navigation is a global leader in navigation and autonomous systems. By leveraging capabilities in software-enhanced hardware, every solution delivers unrivalled capabilities and exceptional performance across land, air, sea and space applications where GPS is unreliable. Headquartered in Sydney, Australia, with research and production facilities nationwide and offices globally, Advanced Navigation is an Australian manufacturer exporting worldwide.

points.title: HYDRUS
points.description: Hydrus is a hovering micro autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) revolutionising underwater data collection across reef monitoring and subsea inspections.
features: Fully autonomous with advanced navigation and communication systems
Integrated DVL, USBL, INS and acoustic modem
High-quality 4K camera for accurate, georeferenced video and imagery

points.title: Subsonus
points.description: Subsonus is a miniature underwater acoustic positioning system that provides high accuracy position, velocity, and heading at ranges of up to 1000 meters.
features: Next-generation USBL2 configuration with multi-transducer architecture
Integrated Inertial Navigation Systems (INS) for 6DoF accuracy
Dynamic power and signal encoding for improved performance

points.title: Subsonus Tag
points.description: Subsonus Tag is an acoustic positioning transponder that operates with the Subsonus USBL.
features: Ultra-long battery life up to 18 months
Multi-track technology for multiple tag deployment
Integrated pressure tolerant display for diver communication
Hermetically sealed design requiring no servicing
Wireless Qi charging and Bluetooth configuration

useCases.title: Applications
useCases.description: Advanced Navigation provides cutting-edge solutions across multiple marine sectors

cases.title: Subsea Positioning
cases.description: High-precision positioning solutions for ROVs, AUVs, and subsea vehicles.

cases.title: Hydrographic Survey
cases.description: Unprecedented performance for each class of marine survey and mapping regardless of application.

cases.title: Vessel & Rig Monitoring
cases.description: Advanced navigation, positioning and monitoring for offshore vessels, rigs, FPSO's and more.
keyPoints: Dynamic attitude including heading, surge, sway, heave, pitch and roll
Precision Navigation regardless of GNSS availability

valueProposition.title: Why Choose Advanced Navigation
valueProposition.description: Built on a culture of research and discovery, Advanced Navigation merges cutting-edge technologies into simple solutions, ensuring swift delivery of capabilities to customers.
highlights: Deep technology expertise across multiple fields
Progress in robotics, underwater acoustics, and quantum sensing

clientPageInteractiveCopy.title: Hydrus
clientPageInteractiveCopy.description: Explore this detailed 3D model of a shipwreck captured by Hydrus. This scan demonstrates Hydrus's advanced underwater mapping capabilities, allowing you to rotate and zoom to examine the wreck from every angle.
